title: Enchants: Vanilla
description: Stop losing your items! Adds Soulbound, Telekinesis, Auto-Smelt and 4 other balanced, Vanilla-friendly enchantments.
body:
✨ Enchanty - The Ultimate Vanilla+ Enchantments

Welcome to Enchanty! This mod adds 7 brand-new, highly balanced, and incredibly useful enchantments to your Minecraft 1.21.1 world. Whether you are a miner, a farmer, or an explorer, there is something here for you.

Fully compatible with Fabric and NeoForge!

  ⛏️ Tool Enchantments
- Telekinesis (Pickaxes/Shovels/Axes): Mined blocks and items go directly into your inventory. No more items falling into lava! 
- Smelting (Pickaxes/Shovels): Automatically smelts mined blocks (e.g., Iron Ore drops Iron Ingots). Works perfectly with Fortune!
- Voiding (Pickaxes/Shovels/Axes): Completely destroys the mined block. Great for clearing large areas of stone or netherrack without filling your inventory. (Note: Cannot be combined with Smelting, Telekinesis, Fortune, or Silk Touch).
- Replanter (Hoes): Automatically replants fully grown crops right after you harvest them. Farming has never been easier!

  🛡️ Armor & Horse Enchantments
- Agility (Boots & Horse Armor): Increases your movement speed (up to 30% at Level III).
- Leaping (Boots & Horse Armor): Increases your jump height and expands your safe-fall distance so you don't take fall damage.

  💀 Special Enchantments
- Soulbound (Any Item): Items with this enchantment will stay in your inventory after you die. Never lose your favorite sword or pickaxe again!

  ⚙️ Survival Integration
All enchantments are fully integrated into the Vanilla survival experience. You can find them in:
- The Enchanting Table
- Librarian Villager Trades
- Dungeon Loot Chests

Tip: You can now apply any level of standard Protection enchantments to Horse Armor using an Anvil!
